info.name: Airtable List Share Links for a Base

params.name: baseId
params.description: The unique identifier of the base (starts with 'app').

items.docs: Returns a list of all active share links for the specified base. Each share includes its type, state, and the user who created it. This endpoint is available to enterprise administrators.

params.name: baseId
params.description: The unique identifier of the base (starts with 'app').

params.name: shareId
params.description: The unique identifier of the share link (starts with 'shr').

items.docs: Updates the configuration of an existing share link for a base. Can be used to enable or disable the share link, or update its access settings.

params.name: baseId
params.description: The unique identifier of the base (starts with 'app').

params.name: shareId
params.description: The unique identifier of the share link (starts with 'shr').

items.docs: Permanently deletes a share link for a base. Anyone who previously had access through this share link will immediately lose access.
